serious_charges_summary: Waging or attempting to wage war against the Govt of India (IPC 121)
Promoting enmity between religious groups (IPC 153A) - 2 charges
Assault to deter public servant from duty (IPC 353)
criminal_background.sources: Self-declared Affidavit archived by Association for Democratic Reforms (ADR)

business_and_contracts.government_contracts: None declared by candidate, spouse, or dependents

controversies_and_notes.pfi_link_allegations: Farhad Ali was arrested in September 2022 in connection with alleged anti-establishment propaganda and communal polarization linked to the Popular Front of India (PFI).
controversies_and_notes.legal_challenges: He challenged a 2022 order extending his investigation period under the UAPA, arguing the Chief Judicial Magistrate lacked jurisdiction for such extensions.
controversies_and_notes.corruption_indicators: No direct corruption or bribery cases are listed; assets are relatively low (approx. 5.6 lakhs) compared to many political candidates.
